name: Adobong Moderno
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine chicken, vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, salt and pepper. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until the mixture dries up slightly.
3. Add water and continue cooking for about 15 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
4. Remove the chicken from the pan and strain the remaining sauce into a separate bowl. Set aside.
5. Debone the chicken and cut it into halves.
6. In a separate bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, salt and pepper.
7. Dip each piece of chicken in egg white, then coat with the dry ingredients mixture.
8. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Fry the coated chicken until it is crisp and golden brown.
Adobo Dip:
1. Combine mayonnaise, adobo sauce, minced parsley, and minced garlic in a bowl.
2. Serve the adobo dip alongside the fried chicken pieces.
